code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业IoT场景设计一个断路器状态机。核心设备是ActuatorController，它依赖PLC Logic执行交易。当连续失败达到3次时，应该进入熔断状态。
明白。CLOSED状态下Normal和IncrementFailures之间的流转我理解：execute_trade失败时计数增加。那CheckThreshold判断后，如果未满3次是直接回到Normal吗？还有成功路径怎么处理？
对，count小于3就回到Normal继续服务。成功时走ResetCount清零。当count等于3时，要触发到EdgeNode的上报，同时整个CLOSED状态退出，进入OPEN熔断。
OPEN状态我画好了，里面包含TelemetryStream和BlockCalls。所有调用都被拒绝并抛出CircuitBreakerError，同时检查60秒超时。未满60秒保持阻断，到了60秒需要通知PLC Logic准备恢复。
超时后进入HALF_OPEN半开状态，这是关键设计。通过MQTT Broker来协调TestRecovery，只允许一个测试调用。这里需要EvaluateResult来判断测试结果。
EvaluateResult的分支我理一下：成功的话通知EdgeNode并回到CLOSED；失败的话走ReOpen再回到PLC Logic所在的OPEN状态。HALF_OPEN本身也有两条退出线指向CLOSED和OPEN，对吗？
完全正确。另外视觉区分很重要：CLOSED用绿色表示正常，OPEN用红色警示熔断，HALF_OPEN用黄色提醒谨慎。这样运维人员一眼就能识别系统健康状态。
全部完成。状态机涵盖了ActuatorController的完整熔断生命周期：CLOSED内的故障累积与清零、OPEN的60秒阻断与超时恢复、HALF_OPEN的单测试验证与双向流转，三种状态的颜色标识也已应用。
